requirement_topic.en: 50 Hz Grid Basis and Tunisia Site Electrical Settings
requirement_topic.zh: 50Hz电网基础和突尼斯场址电气整定
requirement_topic.zht: 50Hz電網基礎和突尼西亞場址電氣整定

summary.en: China and Tunisia normally use a 50 Hz design basis, reducing first-pass screening risk for PCS, transformers, auxiliary supplies, motors, relays, and metering. This does not by itself satisfy STEG interconnection acceptance. The Tunisia point of connection must confirm voltage class, frequency and voltage ride-through, reactive-power control, harmonics, protection settings, grounding, metering, SCADA, dispatch, and commissioning tests.
summary.zh: 中国和突尼斯通常均以50Hz作为设计基础，这可降低PCS、变压器、辅助电源、电机、继电保护和计量的一次筛查风险。但这本身并不能满足STEG并网接受。突尼斯接入点必须确认电压等级、频率和电压穿越、无功控制、谐波、保护整定、接地、计量、SCADA、调度和调试测试。
summary.zht: 中國和突尼西亞通常均以50Hz作為設計基礎，這可降低PCS、變壓器、輔助電源、電機、繼電保護和計量的一次篩查風險。但這本身並不能滿足STEG併網接受。突尼西亞接入點必須確認電壓等級、頻率和電壓穿越、無功控制、諧波、保護整定、接地、計量、SCADA、調度和調試測試。

standards_or_laws: Project-specific frequency and voltage operating windows
PCS, transformer, protection, metering, and SCADA settings for the Tunisia point of connection

summary.en: China factory PCS settings and 50 Hz type-test evidence are useful starting data. They still need Tunisia site validation for voltage class, transformer taps, relay coordination, harmonics, grounding, SCADA mapping, and commissioning records.
summary.zh: 中国工厂PCS整定和50Hz型式试验证据是有用的起始资料，但仍需针对突尼斯电压等级、变压器分接、继电保护配合、谐波、接地、SCADA映射和调试记录进行场址验证。
summary.zht: 中國工廠PCS整定和50Hz型式試驗證據是有用的起始資料，但仍需針對突尼西亞電壓等級、變壓器分接、繼電保護配合、諧波、接地、SCADA映射和調試記錄進行場址驗證。

gap.en: Do not rely only on the 50 Hz match. Provide Tunisia-specific protection settings, power-quality study, short-circuit study, transformer configuration, SCADA mapping, commissioning plan, and site acceptance records.
gap.zh: 不应仅依赖50Hz一致。应提供突尼斯特定保护整定、电能质量研究、短路研究、变压器配置、SCADA映射、调试计划和现场验收记录。
gap.zht: 不應僅依賴50Hz一致。應提供突尼西亞特定保護整定、電能品質研究、短路研究、變壓器配置、SCADA映射、調試計劃和現場驗收記錄。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected BESS where STEG interconnection, grid-code, EPC, owner, insurer, lender, or commissioning approval applies; detailed settings are project-specific
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or contract-specific for China grid-connected projects through grid-company technical review, connection agreement, and commissioning acceptance

source.publisher: Société Tunisienne de l'Electricité et du Gaz (STEG)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The 50 Hz match reduces equipment-screening friction but is not Tunisia interconnection approval; site settings and commissioning remain separate requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 50Hz一致可降低设备筛查摩擦，但不是突尼斯并网批准；场址整定和调试仍是单独要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 50Hz一致可降低設備篩查摩擦，但不是突尼西亞併網批准；場址整定和調試仍是單獨要求。
